verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree.
verse.verse_2: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?
verse.verse_3: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.
verse.verse_4: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
verse.verse_5: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
